Class RequestNotificationServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.RequestNotificationServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
RequestNotificationService
public class RequestNotificationServiceImpl extends Object implements RequestNotificationService
Concrete implementation of RequestNotificationService that prints formatted notification messages to the console and maintains an in-memory record of all dispatched notifications for the duration of the current command execution. In this demo system, "sending a notification" means printing a [NOTIFY] line; no external messaging channel is involved.

  • Constructor Details

    • RequestNotificationServiceImpl

      public RequestNotificationServiceImpl(Staff staff, AuditRepository auditRepository)
      Constructs a new RequestNotificationServiceImpl attributed to the given staff member. All notifications dispatched through this instance will be recorded under staff and persisted to the audit repository with a [NOTIFICATION] level prefix.
      Parameters:
      staff - the staff member responsible for dispatching notifications; must not be null
      auditRepository - the repository used to persist notification entries; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if either argument is null

  • Method Details

    • notifyAdoptionStatusChange

      public void notifyAdoptionStatusChange(AdoptionRequest request)
      Sends a notification to the adopter when the status of their adoption request changes. Throws an exception if the request or its associated adopter is null. Prints a [NOTIFY] line to the console describing the adoption status change, then records the notification in the in-memory list.
      Specified by:
      notifyAdoptionStatusChange in interface RequestNotificationService
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request whose status has changed
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if request is null

    • notifyTransferStatusChange

      public void notifyTransferStatusChange(TransferRequest request)
      Sends a notification to relevant shelter staff when a transfer request status changes. Throws an exception if the request or its associated shelters are null. Prints a [NOTIFY] line to the console describing the transfer status change, then records the notification in the in-memory list.
      Specified by:
      notifyTransferStatusChange in interface RequestNotificationService
      Parameters:
      request - the transfer request whose status has changed
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if request is null

    • listAll

      public List<NotificationRecord> listAll()
      Returns all notifications that have been dispatched. Returns an empty list if no notifications have been sent.
      Specified by:
      listAll in interface RequestNotificationService
      Returns:
      a list of all notification records

    • getByStaff

      public List<NotificationRecord> getByStaff(Staff staff)
      Returns all notifications dispatched by the given staff member. Returns an empty list if the staff member has sent no notifications.
      Specified by:
      getByStaff in interface RequestNotificationService
      Parameters:
      staff - the staff member to query
      Returns:
      a list of notification records sent by the staff member
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if staff is null

    • getByTarget

      public List<NotificationRecord> getByTarget(String targetId)
      Returns all notifications associated with the given target identifier. Returns an empty list if no notifications match the target.
      Specified by:
      getByTarget in interface RequestNotificationService
      Parameters:
      targetId - the identifier of the target object
      Returns:
      a list of notification records for the target
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if targetId is null or blank

    • searchByAction

      public List<NotificationRecord> searchByAction(String keyword)
      Returns all notifications whose action description contains the given keyword. Returns an empty list if no notifications match the keyword.
      Specified by:
      searchByAction in interface RequestNotificationService
      Parameters:
      keyword - the string to search for in action descriptions
      Returns:
      a list of matching notification records
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if keyword is null or blank
